title: Dark Charred Norwegian Lamb Skewers
description: Tender and flavorful lamb skewers charred to perfection, served on a hot stone plate, featuring the distinct taste of Shaoxing wine
instructions: Preheat the hot stone plate to 400 degrees Fahrenheit
In a large bowl, whisk together Shaoxing wine, olive oil, garlic, ginger, black pepper, and salt
Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and marinate for at least 30 minutes
Thread the marinated lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each cube
Place the skewers on the preheated hot stone plate and cook for 5 minutes per side
Brush the lamb with the brown sugar during the last minute of cooking
Remove the skewers from the heat and let rest for 5 minutes before serving
Serve the lamb skewers on the hot stone plate, garnished with fresh herbs if desired
